steps.title: Find the key statement
steps.content: The passage explicitly states “No clear evidence has emerged to favor one of these claims over the others.” This is the crucial point determining the answer.

steps.title: Find the logical conclusion
steps.content:
Choice B expresses the appropriate conclusion: we cannot identify the inventor.

The other options either introduce unsupported facts (A: pre-1860s origin, D: Dallas creator) or claim greater certainty than the passage allows (C: that none of them likely invented it).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
